title: The Claw of the Conciliator
author: Gene Wolfe
description: The Claw of the Conciliator is a science fantasy novel by American writer Gene Wolfe, first released in 1981. It is the second volume in the four-volume series The Book of the New Sun and continues the story of Severian, a journeyman in the Seekers for Truth and Penitence, describing his travels north to the city of Thrax.
